Comments.CorsInfo: CORS AllowedOrigins: empty array = block all (except localhost), ['*'] = allow all, or list specific origins like ['https://app.example.com']. Always allows credentials. Localhost (any port) is auto-allowed in all environments.
Comments.SQLServerSupport: To deploy on Windows IIS with SQL Server, follow these steps:
Comments.Step2: 2. Update DefaultConnection to SQL Server connection string (see example below)
Comments.Step3: 3. Generate SQL Server migrations: dotnet ef migrations add InitialCreate_SqlServer -o Migrations_SqlServer
Comments.Step4: 4. Rebuild and publish: dotnet publish -c Release -o ./publish
